# Project: golden-project

Fixture project used for golden-file tests.

## Architecture
Next.js on Vercel
<!-- aware:section:project:end -->

<!-- aware:section:stack -->
## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 15.1 (App Router)
- **Language**: TypeScript 5.5
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4.0
- **Testing**: Vitest 3.0
- **Linting**: ESLint 9.0
- **Package Manager**: pnpm
- **Deployment**: Vercel
<!-- aware:section:stack:end -->
